finding_results.notes: Reworked the later flat-versus-Manor returns so they no longer repeat the opening architecture contrast. The dinner beat now carries separation through failed heat, metallic food, and a specific shared-meal memory; the mid-scene heat line was removed rather than restated; the closing beat now turns on her refusal to do one ordinary task before bed and the bodily persistence of the Mark connection.

summary: Addressed the packet's repeated quiet-architecture fallback by removing one redundant setting beat and converting the remaining returns into concrete food, action, and bodily-pressure details while preserving the chapter's aftermath state and Harry's corrective role.
